inputs.label: Upstream Mach Number (M₁)
inputs.businessContext: Freestream Mach number before the shock.

businessContext_i18n.en: Freestream Mach number before the shock.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Şok öncesi serbest akış Mach sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de Mach de l'écoulement libre avant le choc.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de Mach de corriente libre antes del choque.

inputs.label: Shock Angle (β)
inputs.businessContext: Angle between upstream flow direction and the shock wave.

businessContext_i18n.en: Angle between upstream flow direction and the shock wave.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yukarı akış yönü ile şok dalgası arasındaki açı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Winkel zwischen der Anströmrichtung und der Stoßwelle.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Angle entre la direction de l'écoulement amont et l'onde de choc.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ángulo entre la dirección del flujo aguas arriba y la onda de choque.

inputs.label: Specific Heat Ratio (γ)
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of specific heats, typically 1.4 for air.

businessContext_i18n.en: Ratio of specific heats, typically 1.4 for air.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Özgül ısı oranı, tipik olarak hava için 1.4.
businessContext_i18n.de: Verhältnis der spezifischen Wärmekapazitäten, typischerweise 1,4 für Luft.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rapport des chaleurs spécifiques, typiquement 1,4 pour l'air.
businessContext_i18n.es: Relación de calores específicos, típicamente 1.4 para el aire.

inputs.label: Upstream Total Pressure (P₀₁)
inputs.businessContext: Stagnation pressure of the freestream, standard sea level is 101325 Pa.

businessContext_i18n.en: Stagnation pressure of the freestream, standard sea level is 101325 Pa.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Serbest akışın durma basıncı, standart deniz seviyesi 101325 Pa.
businessContext_i18n.de: Staudruck der freien Strömung, Standard auf Meereshöhe 101325 Pa.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pression d'arrêt de l'écoulement libre, niveau de la mer standard 101325 Pa.
businessContext_i18n.es: Presión de estancamiento de la corriente libre, nivel del mar estándar es 101325 Pa.
Temperatura de estancamiento de la corriente libre.

inputs.label: Gas Constant (R)
inputs.businessContext: Specific gas constant, 287 J/(kg·K) for dry air.

businessContext_i18n.en: Specific gas constant, 287 J/(kg·K) for dry air.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Özgül gaz sabiti, kuru hava için 287 J/(kg·K).
businessContext_i18n.de: Spezifische Gaskonstante, 287 J/(kg·K) für trockene Luft.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Constante spécifique des gaz, 287 J/(kg·K) pour l'air sec.
businessContext_i18n.es: Constante específica del gas, 287 J/(kg·K) para aire seco.
